title: Terminal: bottom bar + toggled reply overlay + default enter off
action: Move .term-bar to the bottom of the terminal view and add a Reply button to it; remove the floating .reply-fab. Make the reply sheet start hidden and toggle via the Reply button (open) and Cancel/Send (close): add a .reply-sheet[hidden]{display:none} rule so the hidden attribute works despite .reply-sheet display:flex. Move the bar safe-area padding from top to bottom. Default the Press Enter (submit) checkbox to unchecked.

truths: Reply overlay is hidden on load and only appears after tapping Reply
Control bar is fixed at the bottom
artifacts: terminal.ts with a bottom bar Reply button and no reply-fab
styles.css with .reply-sheet[hidden] display none and bottom-anchored bar
prohibitions: Do not change the polling/screen logic

verify: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run

trace.outcome: Terminal: bottom bar with Reply button; reply overlay hidden by default and toggled via Reply/Cancel; submit checkbox defaults off
trace.verify_output: bundle built; vitest 15 passed / 3 files. cargo test + clippy -D warnings clean. Browser (iPhone 14 emulation): bar at bottom, reply overlay hidden on load, Reply button opens it, Cancel hides it, submit checkbox default unchecked.
trace.verify_command: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run
